overall.description: A static view from inside a luxury high-rise hotel room or apartment, likely from Cyberpunk 2077, showing a neatly made bed with panoramic windows overlooking a hazy, overcast futuristic cityscape with towering skyscrapers and a distinctive palm tree.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury hotel room with panoramic city view

agents.ego_description: standing still at the foot of the bed, observing the city view through the panoramic windows

entered.detail: large bed with white cream-colored bedding and pillows, positioned centrally in the room
floor-to-ceiling glass windows spanning the wall, offering view of the city
dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers and high-rise buildings visible through the window
tall palm tree visible just outside the window against the city backdrop
dark wooden nightstand with items on it to the right of the bed
illuminated artwork or light fixture on the left wall
transparent glass wall or divider on the right side of the room

segments.scene_description: The camera remains static inside a modern luxury hotel room, focused on a king-size bed with white linens. Through the panoramic windows, a hazy overcast cityscape with towering skyscrapers is visible, dominated by a single palm tree standing prominently against the urban backdrop. The room features dark wood tones and modern furnishings with soft ambient lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, contemplative perspective within a luxury high-rise interior that emphasizes the contrast between intimate comfort and a sprawling urban expanse. It begins focused on a king-size bed dressed in crisp white linens, surrounded by the dark wood tones and soft ambient lighting of a modern hotel room. As the eye moves toward the background, the interior space gives way to massive panoramic windows that frame the outside world. The scene then opens up to reveal a hazy, overcast futuristic cityscape where towering skyscrapers loom through the mist. Finally, the view settles on a single, prominent palm tree that stands in stark contrast against the dense, gray urban backdrop.
